items.name: egghead-utils
items.title: Egghead utils
items.description: Minimal class-name join helper used by all egghead components.

items.name: egghead-tokens
items.title: Egghead tokens
items.description: Brand tokens for the standalone Egghead app: paper/ink semantic colors with light/dark, tactile shadows, gradients, fluid type and space scales, motion.

items.name: egghead-layout
items.title: Egghead layout system
items.description: Content grid with named tracks (full/breakout/content), placement utilities, and an intrinsic auto-grid.

items.name: egghead-container
items.title: Egghead container
items.description: Page-level content-grid wrapper with width presets and built-in vertical rhythm.

items.name: egghead-structure
items.title: Egghead structure primitives
items.description: Minimal typography and structure primitives for professional CourseBuilder surfaces.

items.name: egghead-button
items.title: Egghead button
items.description: Tactile brand button with yolk, navy, ghost, and rust variants.

items.name: egghead-eggo-mark
items.title: Eggo logomark
items.description: Official egghead eggo logomark as an inline SVG component.
